items.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
items.author: Martin Kleppmann
items.takeaway: An incredible deep-dive into database internals, replication protocols, and consistency models.

items.title: Crafting Interpreters
items.author: Robert Nystrom
items.takeaway: Hands down the most digestible book on compiler and interpreter design. Built both tree-walk and bytecode VMs.

items.title: Clean Code
items.author: Robert C. Martin
items.takeaway: Plan to read to re-evaluate classical OOP patterns in a modern, functional-leaning JS/TS world.

items.title: Building a Digital Garden
items.author: Maggie Appleton
items.takeaway: Articulated the shift from chronological blog streams to topic-based spatial networks of ideas.
